1.description: get kommunenummer and geometry for Drammen municipality

2.description: get 200-year flood polygons (gjentaksintervall=200) from national flood layer

3.description: reduce flomareal to polygons that intersect Drammen municipality extent

4.description: get buildings in Drammen with status FA

5.description: find buildings that intersect the reduced 200-year flood polygons

6.description: deduplicate buildings by bygningid (one row per building)

-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%drammen%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [flomsoner]
SELECT objid, gjentaksintervall, omrade FROM flomsoner_76d14d5fe2fd4a29bfffc266fdcdd820.flomareal WHERE gjentaksintervall = 200;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: spatial_join
-- left_source: 2
-- right_source: 1
-- join_type: "intersects"
-- left_geom: "omrade"
-- right_geom: "omrade"

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 4: query [matrikkelenbygning]
SELECT objid, bygningid, bygningsstatus, kommunenummer, representasjonspunkt FROM matrikkelenbygning_fe504ac373564e10b85865ef2a507c63.bygning WHERE kommunenummer = '3301' AND bygningsstatus = 'FA';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 5: spatial_join
-- left_source: 4
-- right_source: 3
-- join_type: "intersects"
-- left_geom: "representasjonspunkt"
-- right_geom: "omrade"

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 6: aggregate
-- source_step: 5
-- aggregation_type: "min"
-- group_by: ["bygningid"]
-- metric_column: "objid_right"
-- metric_as: "flom_objid"

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 7: sort
-- source_step: 6
-- order_by: "bygningid"
-- order_direction: "asc"

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 8: limit
-- source_step: 7
-- limit: 10
